name: Riddle Door
description: A weathered stone door bars the path, carved with a riddling verse in old script. Three symbols gleam faintly in the rock — sun, moon, and star — and the inscription demands the traveller choose wisely or not at all.
failureConsequence: The wrong symbol flares hot beneath your palm. The door remains sealed and the path ahead is blocked, forcing a long and weary detour through the bramble.
